if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND u.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND u.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSaveUsage :: selectById */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ite.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM pm_save_usage u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = u.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = u.order_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite ON ite.order_item_id = u.order_item_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = u.prod_id WHERE u.save_usage_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSaveUsage :: selectList */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ite.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM pm_save_usage u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = u.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = u.order_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite ON ite.order_item_id = u.order_item_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = u.prod_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSaveUsage :: selectPageList */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ite.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM pm_save_usage u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = u.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = u.order_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite ON ite.order_item_id = u.order_item_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = u.prod_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(u.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmSaveUsage :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_save_usage u
